items.caption: An emergency shut-off switch sign and button mounted on a turquoise wall. the sign is white with red text that reads "emergency shut-off switch." below the sign, there is a metal button with a red center and a blue ring. the button is labeled "emergency shut-off switch" with a red "push" button. the wall has a geometric pattern, and there is a metal railing in the background. the style of the image is a straightforward, real-life photograph with a focus on the safety equipment.
